code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Guest as Guest (Infra_RedisCache)
    participant Writer as Writer (Infra_IngressController)
    participant Editor as Editor (Infra_RedisCache)
    participant Admin as Admin (Infra_EtcdCluster)
    participant CArticle as "Create Article"
    participant EArticle as "Edit Article"
    participant DArticle as "Delete Article"
    participant CComment as "Create Comment"
    participant CReply as "Create Reply"
    participant ManageRoles as "Manage User Roles"


    %% Admin actions
    Admin->>ManageRoles: Can manage user roles
    Admin->>CArticle: Can create article
    Admin->>EArticle: Can edit any article
    Admin->>DArticle: Can delete any article
    Admin->>CComment: Can create comment
    Admin->>CReply: Can create reply


    %% Editor actions
    Editor->>CArticle: Can create article
    Editor->>EArticle: Can edit any article
    Editor->>CComment: Can create comment
    Editor->>CReply: Can create reply


    %% Writer actions
    Writer->>CArticle: Can create article
    Writer->>EArticle: Can edit own article
    Writer->>CComment: Can create comment
    Writer->>CReply: Can create reply

    %% Guest actions
    Guest->>CComment: Can create comment
    Guest->>CReply: Can create reply
repo_description: Backend service for a collaborative multi-author blog platform built with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Socket.io, featuring JWT authentication, dynamic role-based permissions, and real-time comments

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个权限系统的时序图，展示四种用户角色：Guest、Writer、Editor和Admin。每个角色对应不同的基础设施组件，比如Admin跑在EtcdCluster上，Writer走IngressController。
明白，Guest和Editor都关联RedisCache对吧？然后操作节点我列了五个：Create Article、Edit Article、Delete Article、Create Comment、Create Reply，还有Manage User Roles给Admin。这样覆盖全吗？
对的，Guest和Editor共享RedisCache。操作节点没问题，但Manage User Roles只有Admin能执行，这个要单独标出来。
好，我先画出Admin的权限流：Admin到ManageRoles是"Can manage user roles"，到Create Article是"Can create article"，Edit Article和Delete Article都是any article，Comment和Reply都能操作。
Editor跟Admin很像，但没有Delete权限，也不能管角色。Writer更受限，只能edit own article。Guest只能发评论和回复，不能碰文章。
确认一下：Writer的Edit Article标注"edit own article"，其他角色是"edit any article"，这样区分对吧？Guest完全看不到文章操作节点？
没错，Guest只连到Create Comment和Create Reply。Writer和Editor都能create article，但Writer不能删，Editor不能管角色。
完成。现在图里四条权限线都清晰了：Admin六条全通，Editor五条缺Delete和ManageRoles，Writer五条但Edit受限，Guest两条仅评论相关。基础设施标签也都带上了。
